name_cn:
Chane1 💨24S Pearl mini CF AS4868
Pearls paired with gold chains complement each other. The double-bead design is more novel and unique, featuring a small double-C logo. A simple, elegant, and exquisite feel. The adjustable chain suits any height. Simply wonderful.Size: 11.5×17×5cm
